EJAZ RAZA FILMS

TELLING STORIES THROUGH FILM

About

WHO I AM

I'm a filmmaker from Karachi, Pakistan, based in the USA. I grew up surrounded by stories that never made it to screen, and that's what pushed me toward cinema. My short documentary Surfers of Silver Linings took me back to one of Karachi's islands where, through interviews with its people and children, I tried to give voice to lives full of struggle and quiet determination. The film won the Best Documentary Award at the National Amateur Short Film Festival 2022, but more than any recognition, it reinforced what I have always believed: the most powerful stories are hiding in plain sight, in the city that made me.

MY APPROACH

I’ve always been more interested in people than in cameras. The gear, the training, and the technique all exist to serve the story and the person at its center. I handle projects from concept to execution across formats and cultures, and I bring the same level of attention to a 30-second reel as I do to a full-length documentary.

WHAT I OFFER

End-to-end production.

  • TVC & DVC
  • Documentaries & short films
  • Corporate videos
  • Interviews & podcasts
  • Reels & social media content
Let's work together
Receiving the Best Documentary Award for Surfers of Silver Linings from the Honorable Prime Minister of Pakistan, Mr. Mian Muhammad Shahbaz Sharif, at the National Amateur Short Film Festival 2022.

SELECTED
WORK

My Projects

Surfers of Silver Linings

Best Documentary Award • NASFF 2022

A short documentary highlighting the dedication of the people on one of Karachi’s islands.

UNDO

Shortfilm • Directed by Syed Ejaz Raza Naqvi

A visual exploration of rhythm and movement.

Forgotten

Short Film • Directed by Syed Ejaz Raza Naqvi

A cinematic exploration of memory and loss.

Joel The Showman

Short Documentary • Directed by Syed Ejaz Raza Naqvi

A street performer's journey through rhythm and resilience.

Thread

Cinematic Montage • Directed by Syed Ejaz Raza Naqvi

A visual exploration of connection and narrative rhythm.

Sisyphus

Musical Shortfilm • Directed by Syed Ejaz Raza Naqvi

A rhythmic and visual journey through cyclic struggle and artistic perseverance.
